title: ContextEnvelope
description: Output of context-router. Passed to model-router for every assistant request. Contains resolved identity, mode, memory scope, and routing decision.

request_id.description: Correlation ID from the incoming request

mode.description: Current operating mode for this conversation turn

eligible_memory_scopes.description: Which memory scopes may be accessed in this context

max_tool_tier.description: Maximum tool tier (T0–T4) allowed in this context. model-router enforces this.

routing_action.description: Whether to answer, ask a clarifying question, or escalate

escalation_reason.description: Why escalation is required, if routing_action=ESCALATE

device_id.description: ID of the device making the request (voice device, web session, etc.)

device_location.description: Physical location of the device (kitchen, office, etc.)
